items.title: US war in Iran is pushing up gas prices and making a case for home solar
items.summary: On today's independent episode of Quick Charge , we take a look at refining and distributing our own fuel supply with home solar as America's war in Iran rages on, shooting gas prices (and EV sales) into the stratosphere.

items.title: Apps on the App Store are being updated by Apple, though there's no clear reason why
items.summary: A range of seemingly random apps in the App Store have been updated by Apple itself, though nothing has been shared about why, nor have there been changes in the codebases themselves. VLC was updated by Apple to improve functionality Apple...

items.title: Apple Continues Promoting iOS 26 and macOS 26 Liquid Glass With Updated Design Gallery
items.summary: Apple is continuing to highlight the Liquid Glass aesthetic that it introduced in iOS 26 , iPadOS 26 , and macOS 26. The company has shared an updated Liquid Glass Design Gallery that shows off Liquid Glass in third-party apps. The visual...

items.title: Proposed class action accuses Apple of scraping millions of YouTube videos for AI training
items.summary: Lawsuit says Apple used a dataset comprising millions of YouTube videos to train an AI model, as described in a study published in late 2024. Here are the details.

items.title: Broken EV chargers? This program replaces them for free
items.summary: Everged is rolling out a new program aimed at fixing one of the EV industry's most persistent problems: broken and outdated chargers that never seem to get repaired.
